mapper.select: SELECT TPWE.ID, TPWE.PROCESS_CODE, TPWE.PROCESS_NAME, TPWE.QUANTITY, TPWE.START_TIME, TPWE.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TPWE.CREATE_BY_NAME, TPWE.CREATE_TIME, LISTAGG(SFB.FILE_ID, ',') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY SFB.FILE_ID ) FILE_IDS FROM T_PRD_WATER_ELECTRICITY TPWE LEFT JOIN SYS_FILE_BUSINESS SFB ON TPWE.ID = SFB.BUSINESS_ID WHERE TPWE.TRUST_ID = #{trustId,jdbcType=BIGINT} GROUP BY TPWE.ID, TPWE.PROCESS_CODE, TPWE.PROCESS_NAME, TPWE.QUANTITY, TPWE.START_TIME, TPWE.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, CREATE_BY_NAME, TPWE.CREATE_TIME ORDER BY TPWE.START_TIME

SELECT TBR.ID, TBR.ID AS RAET_ID, TBR.RATE_ITEM_CODE, TBR.RATE_ITEM_NAME, TBR.SERVICE_CONTENT_ID, TBR.SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME, TBR.PROCESS_CODE, TBR.PROCESS_NAME, TBR.CARGO_CODE, TBR.CARGO_NAME, TBR.INTE_FORE, TBR.RATE, TBR.TAX_RATE, TBR.MEASUREMENT_UNIT_CODE1, MDD_UNIT.DICT_LABEL MEASUREMENT_UNIT_NAME1, TBR.MEASUREMENT_UNIT_CODE2, TBR.STATUS, TBR.START_DATE, TBR.END_DATE, TBR.REMARK, TBR.CREATE_BY, TBR.CREATE_BY_NAME, TBR.CREATE_TIME, TBR.UPDATE_BY, TBR.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TBR.UPDATE_TIME FROM T_BUS_RATE TBR JOIN M_DICT_DATA MDD_UNIT ON (MDD_UNIT.DICT_TYPE = 'UNIT' AND TBR.MEASUREMENT_UNIT_CODE1 = MDD_UNIT.DICT_VALUE) WHERE TBR.STATUS = '10' AND (TBR.RATE_ITEM_CODE IN ('MS00287', 'MS00276', 'MS00308','MS00288'))

SELECT ID, TYPE, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TRUST_ID, "NUMBER", RATE_ITEM_CODE, RATE_ITEM_NAME, RATE, TAX_RATE, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, AMOUNT, TAX_AMOUNT, STATUS, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, RATE_ID FROM T_COST_SHIP WHERE TRUST_ID = #{trustId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
INSERT ALL
INTO T_COST_SHIP(ID, TYPE, SHIPVOYAGE_ID,SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TRUST_ID, "NUMBER", RATE_ITEM_CODE, RATE_ITEM_NAME, RATE, TAX_RATE, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, AMOUNT, TAX_AMOUNT, STATUS, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME,RATE_ID ) VALUES (#{entity.id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.shipvoyageId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.shipvoyageItemId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.trustId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.number, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{entity.rateItemCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.rateItemName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.rate, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.taxRate, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.unitCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.unitName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.amount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.taxAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{entity.updateBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.updateByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},#{entity.companyId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.customerId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.customerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{entity.rateId, jdbcType=BIGINT} )
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL

INSERT INTO T_COST_STATEMENT(ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, STATEMENT_NO, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, TYPE, TRUST_ID, TRUST_CARGO_ID, HANDOVERLIST_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, SETTLEMENT_DATE, STATUS, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, IS_FINAL) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{statementNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{customerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trustId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{trustCargoId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{handoverlistId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageItemId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cargoCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tradeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{settlementDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{isFinal, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

INSERT ALL
INTO T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL(ID, STATEMENT, CONTRACT_ID, RATE_ITEM_CODE, RATE_ITEM_NAME, SERVICE_CONTENT_ID, SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, RATE, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, "NUMBER", AMOUNT, TAX, TAX_AMOUNT, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, BUSINESS_ID,RATE_ID) VALUES (#{entity.id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.statement, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.contractId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.rateItemCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.rateItemName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.serviceContentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.serviceContentName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.processCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.processName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.rate, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.unitCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.unitName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.number, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.amount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.tax, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.taxAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{entity.businessId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.rateId, jdbcType=BIGINT})
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM T_COST_SHIP WHERE TYPE = '20' AND TRUST_ID = #{trustId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT TCS.ID, TCS.COMPANY_ID, TCS.COMPANY_NAME, TCS.STATEMENT_NO, TCS.CUSTOMER_ID, TCS.CUSTOMER_NAME, TCS.TYPE, TCS.TRUST_ID, TCS.TRUST_CARGO_ID, TCS.HANDOVERLIST_ID, TCS.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TCS.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TCS.CARGO_CODE, TCS.CARGO_NAME, TCS.TRADE_TYPE, TCS.SETTLEMENT_DATE, TCS.STATUS, TCS.REMARK, TCS.CREATE_BY, TCS.CREATE_BY_NAME, TCS.CREATE_TIME, TCS.UPDATE_BY, TCS.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TCS.UPDATE_TIME, TCS.IS_FINAL FROM T_COST_STATEMENT TCS JOIN T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL TCSD ON TCS.ID = TCSD.STATEMENT WHERE TYPE = '40' AND TCSD.BUSINESS_ID = #{businessId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
